召集：所有喺聯合國工作嘅香港人

一齊響應聯合國價值，
響應 8月19日 World Humanitarian Day，
保衛人權，反對暴力。

My cousin is doing a PhD since nowadays a master’s degree 📜 isn’t worth the paper it’s written on, let alone a bachelor degree 📜 Last Wednesday she nearly got swindled out of thousands of dollars. I told her that person was a scammer who was trying to swindled money from her. The contract isn’t worth the paper it’s printed on. Fortunately she listened to me. Otherwise the scammer would’ve swindled her out of thousands of dollars. By the way, yesterday she accidentally dented my chair with a dumbbell 💪🏼 I said I’d wipe her slate clean if she fixed the dent in the chair😆

replies.msg: My cousin Jason is planning on doing a PhD since today a master’s degree isn’t worth the paper it’s written on let alone a bachelor degree 📜 Last Wednesday he nearly got swindled out of thousands of dollars. I told him that person was a scammer who was trying to swindle money from him. Fortunately he listened to me. Otherwise the scammer would’ve swindled him out of thousands of dollars. Yesterday he dropped a dumbbell and put a dent in my chair. I said I’d wipe his slate clean if he fixed the dent in my chair. His brother has recently opened a beauty parlour. Hopefully it attracts lots of customers since he bet the farm on it. His uncle was broke several years ago because he bet the ranch on his company which went bankrupt later. His auntie is a professional footballer. She’s so focused during a match that she never goes off on a sidetrack. His younger sister who’s a concierage feels she’s chosen the wrong career. I said “why not wipe the slate clean and start over in a different career?” Jason too suggested her to study a degree course at a university and start with a clean slate. She blames her bad career decision on Jason. I said “let’s just wipe the slate clean. It’s over.” She blames him for convincing her to become a concierage. Well that’s the way the cookie crumbles. His grandfather 👴🏻 was commissioned as a senior officer in the army whereas his  great grandfather 👴🏻 accepted a commission as a sergeant major in the Air Force during the Cold War.

quote.msg: My cousin Jason is planning on doing a PhD since today a master’s degree isn’t worth the paper it’s written on let alone a bachelor degree 📜 Last Wednesday he nearly got swindled out of thousands of dollars. I told him that person was a scammer who was trying to swindle money from him. Fortunately he listened to me. Otherwise the scammer would’ve swindled him out of thousands of dollars. Yesterday he dropped a dumbbell and put a dent in my chair. I said I’d wipe his slate clean if he fixed the dent in my chair. His brother has recently opened a beauty parlour. Hopefully it attracts lots of customers since he bet the farm on it. His uncle was broke several years ago because he bet the ranch on his company which went bankrupt later. His auntie is a professional footballer. She’s so focused during a match that she never goes off on a sidetrack. His younger sister who’s a concierage feels she’s chosen the wrong career. I said “why not wipe the slate clean and start over in a different career?” Jason too suggested her to study a degree course at a university and start with a clean slate. She blames her bad career decision on Jason. I said “let’s just wipe the slate clean. It’s over.” She blames him for convincing her to become a concierage. Well that’s the way the cookie crumbles. His grandfather 👴🏻 was commissioned as a senior officer in the army whereas his  great grandfather 👴🏻 accepted a commission as a sergeant major in the Air Force during the Cold War.

標題：「警察還眼」明天1PM全民入機場 百萬人塞爆機場

無時間文宣
見POST者，自行Copy開新Post，要連登全部都係呢個Post


812起 1PM，有人性既你立刻罷工，百萬人進入機場，咩都唔做，勢要討回雙眼
機場因為100萬人係機場而暫停運作，不是們的責任，是因為機場不夠大
圍到出青馬，都全條橋唔夠闊

統一口號，兩句，要入健力士，等歷史知道
「黑警還眼」
「五大訴求，缺一不可」

黑警聽住：
一係你就入機場殺哂所有人
一係你就還返隻眼出黎
否則百萬人不離開機場


大群：https://t.me/airport730
實時Channel: https://t.me/hk730air
